sanskrit: इदं ते नातपस्काय नाभक्ताय कदाचन। न चाशुश्रूषवे वाच्यं न च मां योऽभ्यसूयति॥
transliteration: idaṃ te nātapaskāya nābhaktāya kadācana | na cāśuśrūṣave vācyaṃ na ca māṃ yo 'bhyasūyati ||
literal_meaning: This (confidential knowledge) is not to be spoken to one who is without austerity, not a devotee, never to one disinclined to hear, nor to one who is envious of Me.
contextual_meaning: Krishna warns that deep transformative truths must be shared only with those who have cultivated inner readiness; premature exposure invites distortion, hostility, or spiritual harm.
psychological_state: A state of calibrated disclosure—assessing ego strength, openness, and absence of envy before sharing potent insights.
trigger_scenario: A therapist deciding whether to reveal a trauma narrative or shadow-work exercise to a client who currently lacks ego stability or shows skepticism toward the process.
anchor_text: Share sacred truths only with those ready to receive them.
